$notes: Hero banner image library. Each entry powers the 'change image' chip on merchant hero slots — the platform queries this file by intersecting merchant.trade_keywords with entries[].keywords_strict (strict match only). Extracted theme palette can be applied to merchant brand tokens when they select an image.

$field_reference.subject: one-line human-readable description
$field_reference.keywords_strict: exact search terms this image legitimately serves. Merchant search intent must intersect this list for the image to surface.
$field_reference.vibe: brand-tone descriptor (working / retail / premium / craft / dramatic / etc.)
$field_reference.sibling_group_id: groups related images (e.g. same photoshoot, same tradesperson persona)
$field_reference.hero_use_case: one-paragraph advisor note on best-fit merchant positioning
$field_reference.burned_in_text: image has text overlay already — skip additional text

sibling_groups.timber-supply-chain: Sawmill + timber yard + delivery + processing images. Warm-honey palette family.
sibling_groups.wood-turning: Turned staircase parts — manufacture + retail variants.
sibling_groups.staircase-fitter-series: Same bearded fitter across manufacture → spray → install → hero (4 stages, one persona).
sibling_groups.carpenter-golden-hour-series: Same dark-cap tradesperson across outdoor construction jobs (formwork / fence / shed / door / roof).
sibling_groups.carpenter-workshop-series: Same craftsperson at workbench across bespoke joinery scenarios.
sibling_groups.plasterer-external-render: Same plasterer across 3 angles of the same external render job.
sibling_groups.kitchen-designs-portfolio: Finished kitchen design showcases — no workers, styled interior shots. Used on merchant Designs tab as portfolio/inspiration cards with a Ref code so customers can quote a specific design when enquiring.
sibling_groups.kitchen-product-shots: Individual kitchen product photography — worktops, cabinet doors, carcasses, handles etc. Used as PDP hero images on the Products tab of trade / merchant canteens.

entries.subject: Working timber yard with stacked cut structural timber, green log-grabber crane, pine forest backdrop, wet gravel ground
keywords_strict: timber fencing post supplier from saw mill
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for builders' merchants / timber yards. Warm honey timber tones + cool forest green pair with earthy CTAs.

entries.subject: Professional loft ladder showroom interior with 3 fully-extended timber loft ladders on right side, walnut consultation desk with leather chair on left, warm track lighting, wood-plank floor
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for loft ladder specialist retailers targeting homeowners. Warm honey + walnut suggests premium brand.

entries.subject: Wide showroom with 7 fully-extended timber loft ladders spanning the frame, dark ceiling, cream walls, wood-plank floor, small display cabinets between ladders
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for loft ladder retailers wanting to signal 'full range in stock'. Horizontal repetition emphasises breadth.

entries.subject: Wood-turning production workshop with multiple industrial green cast-iron lathes, hundreds of finished turned balusters/spindles/newel posts in background, wood shavings on floor, dust extraction ducting
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for wood-turning manufacturers wanting 'we make it here' authenticity. Industrial green is a distinctive brand differentiator.

entries.subject: Dedicated staircase-parts showroom with floor-to-ceiling baluster wall display, fully-built balustrade sample on left, finished newel post stock racked horizontally right
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for stair-parts specialist retailers. Warm honey + walnut speaks to 'every profile in stock'.

entries.subject: Staircase showroom with 5 complete stair runs side-by-side showing different timber species and baluster styles (oak with cream balusters, walnut with black iron balusters, painted stringer, etc.)
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for staircase fitters targeting spec-and-build / commercial. Cooler stone-tile floor + wrought-iron accents give architectural feel.

entries.subject: Warmer wooden staircase showroom with 4 stair installations (mahogany scroll, oak with iron balusters, cream stringer, pale oak run), wood-plank floor, reclaimed-plank feature wall
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for staircase installers targeting homeowners. Warm palette signals 'your home, our craft'.

entries.subject: Trade wholesale warehouse for staircase parts with rows of newel posts and balusters, fully-assembled sample stairs, stacks of loose treads/risers/stringer stock on pallets, industrial shelving with more inventory
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for trade wholesalers. Cool grey shelving undertone signals 'we stock volume, not just samples'.

entries.subject: Product hero close-up of finished timber mouldings stacked in variety (skirtings, architraves, ovolo, torus, ogee, panel profiles) across multiple timber species, machinery blurred in background
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for mouldings suppliers. Multi-species mix supports 'we stock every wood' positioning.

entries.subject: Wood-moulding manufacturing floor with pallet loads of freshly-run mouldings foreground, green spindle moulder machine mid-ground, warehouse depth with more shelving and stock
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for mouldings manufacturers. Consistent industrial-green baseline with other maker/mill imagery.

entries.subject: Loaded articulated timber lorry in sawmill yard at golden-hour, trailer stacked with strapped bundles of fresh-cut structural timber, log-grabber crane working left mid-ground, deep pine forest backdrop
entries.hero_use_case: Cinematic landing hero for timber merchants wanting 'we source direct' / heritage-craftsmanship positioning.

entries.subject: Inside sawmill shed with raw pine log mid-cut on green cast-iron band-saw carriage, freshly-sawn planks stacked right, logs on log-deck left, doorway opening onto pine forest with warm daylight
keywords_strict: saw mill processing tree into wood
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for artisan / heritage sawmills. Consistent green baseline with other maker imagery.

entries.subject: Industrial sawmill production line — large green band-saw with fresh log entering, roller conveyors either side carrying planed dimensional timber, mill floor extending to warehousing behind
keywords_strict: saw mill processing tree into wood
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for high-volume sawmill / bulk timber supplier. Reads as 'shift-run production, not artisan'.

entries.subject: Outdoor decking display garden with 6+ composite decking material samples laid side-by-side as floor panels, pergola with vertical timber slat sample boards, planters, small display of composite balustrade and steps right, green hedging backdrop
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for composite decking suppliers with physical showroom. Signals 'walk on the samples before you buy'.

entries.subject: Built residential deck with warm brown-stained timber decking and matching brown deck railing, dining set left, brown timber shed mid-background, outdoor sofa right, green trees + hedging framing, summer light
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for decking installers selling to homeowners. Warm walnut + saddle brown feels premium and inviting.

entries.subject: Small garden deck with pale sage-green tanalised timber planks and matching tanalised railing with ball-topped newel posts, olive-stained shed backdrop, wicker sofa right, lavender in planters
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for traditional UK builders' merchants selling tanalised timber decking. Cottage-garden lavender accent gives cosy edge.

entries.subject: Tanalised deck floor with preservative-tinted planks, dark green painted shed backdrop, dining set + wicker sofa, lavender + shrubs in borders
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for decking preservative / treatment merchants. Sage-olive theme complements 'protect your investment' messaging.

entries.subject: Flatbed truck loaded with strapped pallets of tanalised decking/sleepers under blue sky, outdoor delivery scene
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for garden timber / sleeper delivery merchants. Warm timber + blue sky palette suggests 'we deliver same-day'.

entries.subject: Natural-timber garden deck with cream L-sofa, low coffee table with plants, lavender + white globe blooms in border, lawn beyond, pergola posts right
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for decking installers doing higher-end residential. Cream sofa suggests 'built for the lifestyle you want'.

entries.subject: Premium deck with warm LED strip lighting built into stair risers and planter edges, evening ambient light, dark walnut decking, cream sofa, high-end residential garden
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for premium decking + landscape lighting installers. LED-warm gold accent doubles as CTA colour.

entries.subject: Plasterer on scaffold facing wall, front view, working on external render at top-right corner of building, scaffolded soffit visible
entries.hero_use_case: Documentary hero for plasterers / external rendering specialists. Real-worker authenticity beats stock imagery for trust.

entries.subject: Side-on close working shot of plasterer applying float to external wall, scaffold visible right, house corner and window edge visible
entries.hero_use_case: Best composition of the plasterer trio — cleanest sky, cinematic. Lead-of-three for a plasterer merchant carousel.

entries.subject: Back view of plasterer skimming external wall face, scaffold not visible, worker-on-wall composition
entries.hero_use_case: Third angle of the plasterer trio. Use as section-page hero (services page) alongside the lead 01_47_47.

entries.subject: Apex-roof timber garden shed with open double doors and windows, sage-green painted felt roof, gravel path, lavender border, dark-stained fence backdrop, lush lawn
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for garden shed suppliers. Sage roof + lavender give a cosy cottage vibe.

entries.subject: Log-cabin garden office / sunroom with full-length glass doors and side window, desk + chair visible inside, silver birch beside, rendered stone wall behind, paved patio
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for garden office / log cabin suppliers. Positions merchant as premium remote-workspace specialist.

entries.subject: Close-up house corner with pale timber-clad gable, wood fascia + soffit board installed, black roof tile edging, black rainwater downpipe, black-framed window below
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for exterior finish carpenters / roofline timber specialists. Timber + black roof = premium new-build signalling.

entries.subject: Three timber dog kennels in ascending sizes lined up on gravel path, lawn foreground, dark fence backdrop, lush garden borders, golden-hour side-light
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for bespoke pet-housing manufacturers. Three sizes narrate 'we make bespoke to your dog'.

entries.subject: Three traditional National-style timber beehives with dovetailed brood + super boxes on low wooden bench, cottage garden, wildflowers + lavender + white blooms, golden-hour side-light
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for beekeeping merchants / honey producers. Golden honey accent doubles as CTA colour.

entries.subject: Log-cabin garden sunroom with glass doors and side window, sofa + plants visible inside, lawn + gravel path, dark fence backdrop, wildflower border, warm evening light
entries.hero_use_case: Alternative garden sunroom hero — warmer, more residential 'hideaway' vibe than the office-positioned 11_58_14.

entries.subject: Three metal / galvanised garden sheds side-by-side (cream, olive-green, charcoal grey) on gravel bases with lush green backdrop, lavender and ornamental grasses border
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for metal shed suppliers. Distinct from wooden — cool charcoal palette suggests modern engineering.

entries.subject: Three timber garden sheds in golden-hour side-light (small apex, small with window, large with double doors), gravel path, lawn + lavender + hedging
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for boutique wooden shed suppliers. Golden-hour warmth suggests aspirational lifestyle.

entries.subject: Three larger timber sheds with black felt roofs (big double-door apex, medium with double window, medium with single door), gravel base, lawn, lavender and hydrangea, potted olive tree left
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for wooden shed suppliers targeting larger buildings / trade orders. Black felt roofs signal 'premium finish'.

entries.subject: Installer fitting loft ladder — tradesperson in dark cap + hoodie + leather tool belt using yellow DeWalt drill on spring mechanism at ceiling hatch, extended ladder in foreground, warm domestic interior
entries.hero_use_case: Documentary service-page hero for loft ladder INSTALLERS (distinct from showroom sellers). Real-worker authenticity.

entries.subject: Concrete formwork carpenter at golden hour on construction site, hammering timber formwork, rebar cages + concrete columns behind, exposed foundation trenches
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for formwork / shuttering carpenters serving commercial construction. Sunset gold reads as CTA colour.

entries.subject: Golden-hour tradesperson kneeling against fresh tanalised fence panel, hammering rails, full-height closeboard fence with capping rail extending down garden, sunset sky, neighbouring house silhouette
entries.hero_use_case: Service-page hero for fencers / garden builders. Part of golden-hour carpenter series — bundleable with other outdoor jobs.

entries.subject: Same golden-hour tradesperson kneeling against timber garden shed mid-build, hammering wall panel with doorway framed open, sub-floor bearers foreground, toolbox right
entries.hero_use_case: Service-page hero for shed installers. Part of golden-hour carpenter series.

entries.subject: Same golden-hour carpenter hammering frame/hinge area of timber panel door on new-build site, fresh timber cladding wall, sunset behind pine treeline
entries.hero_use_case: Service-page hero for door-repair carpenters. Real-world site context helps 'we come to you' insurance-claim positioning.

entries.subject: First-fix roofing carpenter installing timber roof trusses / rafters on open pitched-roof frame, dramatic diagonal composition, sunset sky, pine treeline
entries.hero_use_case: Service-page hero for first-fix / structural / cut-roof carpenters. Do NOT tag as roofer — different trade.

entries.subject: Same golden-hour worker hammering timber roofing battens over freshly-laid black roofing membrane on pitched roof, sunset sky, chimney visible

text_zone.note: black membrane is the darkest quiet zone in library

entries.hero_use_case: Service-page hero for the next stage after 10_44_14 — narrates 'we do frame + membrane + battens before roofer takes over'.

entries.subject: 10-image collage grid (2 rows × 5 columns) of exterior front-door variations across timber species, colours, and surrounds — catalog format

text_zone.note: Never use as full-bleed hero; use as split-hero right side with text left

entries.hero_use_case: Category-index landing OR split-hero right-side content. Merchant text sits left, grid right. Signals 'we stock every style'.

entries.subject: Two construction workers on concrete-frame building site — one in yellow hat with yellow digital laser level projecting red laser lines, other in white helmet + hi-vis holding tablet with engineering drawing
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for site engineers / setting-out engineers / building surveyors — WHITE-COLLAR construction professionals. Laser-orange accent is distinctive.

entries.subject: Dramatic effect shot — gloved hand + orange screwdriver on breaker in fuse board, orange spark lightning arcs from hand across dark backdrop, wired panel right
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for electrical brand marketing — dramatic branding punch, not service-page use. Best for 'we do 24/7 emergency' positioning.

entries.subject: Dramatic spark shot from angle, screwdriver on breaker, multimeter + pliers on desk foreground
entries.hero_use_case: Alternate dramatic electrical hero — includes visible tools for 'trade-professional' framing.

entries.subject: Real electrician — casual clothes, screwdriver + gloves at consumer unit, calm domestic interior with window light behind
entries.hero_use_case: Service-page hero for domestic electricians. Real-worker trust beats dramatic marketing shots for 'book me' pages.

entries.subject: Dark hero shot of Schneider consumer unit with labelled circuits (Lighting Living Room, Kitchen Sockets, Water Heater, etc.), multi-function monitor showing 235V, wide letterbox aspect

text_zone.note: left half is pure black — ideal for large hero text

entries.hero_use_case: Product-hero for electrical merchants — 'we install to spec'. Black left-half is ideal for large text overlay.

entries.subject: Full-frame consumer unit — same Schneider board but centred + closer, 'DANGER 400V AC' warning label visible top-right, edge-to-edge product

text_zone.primary: N/A — image edge-to-edge; use as split-hero right side

entries.hero_use_case: Split-hero right-side content or category-page hero. Do NOT use as full-bleed with text overlay.

entries.subject: Four-core stripped cable with copper conductors, orange + blue lightning arcs between conductors, black backdrop, dramatic effect
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for electrical wholesalers / cable specialists. Left-half black is ideal for large text overlay.

entries.subject: Five-core stripped cable with blue lightning arcs, more cables visible including green earth, black backdrop
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for data cable / structured wiring merchants. Blue-heavy palette for tech-forward brand.

entries.subject: Four-core stripped cable with orange lightning — cleaner + wider composition than 01_34_24, more empty left space

text_zone.note: biggest text zone in the electrical library

entries.hero_use_case: PREMIUM landing hero for electrical wholesalers — cleanest composition of the dramatic-cable set. Biggest text zone.

entries.subject: First/second-fix electrician in unfinished timber-framed house fitting yellow + white wires around stud, back-boxes visible, unfinished framing extending back
entries.hero_use_case: Service-page hero for electricians serving new-builds. Timber framing gives 'we work with construction' feel.

entries.subject: Carpenter fitting bespoke understair cabinets/drawers — kneeling with DeWalt drill + hammer on hardwood floor, pulling drawer from unfinished MDF cabinetry built into staircase void, hallway to kitchen behind
entries.hero_use_case: Service-page hero for bespoke understair storage specialists (Neatsmith-style operators). Niche but authentic.

entries.subject: Installed modern oak staircase with glass balustrade infill, fitter posed elegantly holding handrail with tool belt, gallery-style hallway with wall art, dark parquet floor, mezzanine glass continues, minimalist decor
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for glass-balustrade staircase installers. Editorial magazine feel signals premium bespoke.

entries.subject: Same fitter mid-install — kneeling brushing/staining tread on oak staircase with vertical glass balustrade panels, slat-panel feature wall behind, plants + DeWalt toolbag foreground, bright morning light
entries.hero_use_case: Service-page hero showing 'we fit it in your home'. Part of staircase-fitter-series 4-stage narrative.

entries.subject: Same tradesperson in workshop / spray booth wearing respirator, spray-gun in hand, misting lacquer/stain over fully-built oak staircase with turned balusters, compressor foreground
entries.hero_use_case: About-page hero showing 'we spray-finish in-house before delivery'. Part of staircase-fitter-series.

entries.subject: Same tradesperson in workshop assembling/finishing newel post on same-style oak staircase, chisel in hand, DeWalt drill + hammer + wood glue on workbench
entries.hero_use_case: About-page hero — 'we make it ourselves'. First stage in the 4-stage manufacture→spray→install narrative.

entries.subject: Bearded fitter posed with hammer against oak staircase with turned balusters, hardwood floor, cream walls, doorway with daylight left
entries.hero_use_case: Service-page hero for staircase installers. Classic turned-baluster style distinguishes from the glass-balustrade variant (01_00_58).

entries.subject: Same fitter kneeling under stair rail with hammer, repairing or fitting stringer detail, cream hallway with daylight from door left
entries.hero_use_case: Service-page hero for staircase refurb / repair specialists. Signals 'we restore, not just install'.

entries.subject: Craftsperson at workbench hand-carving decorative panel with chisels, vintage tool wall behind, warm workshop light from window left, shavings on bench
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for heritage joiners / bespoke wood-carvers. Signals 'artisan craft, not factory'.

entries.subject: Carpenter kneeling fitting oak skirting board against cream wall, window light left, nail-gun + tape + hammer + chisels on floor foreground
entries.hero_use_case: Service-page hero for trim carpenters — pairs with Phase 16 Trim Carpenter calc audience.

entries.subject: Craftsperson at workbench hand-sawing oak plank, full workshop set behind with tool wall, window daylight from left, hand-planes and chisels on bench
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for heritage joiners / bespoke workshops. Warm side-lit atmosphere signals 'artisan operation'.

entries.subject: Same craftsperson marking out with pencil + rule on bench, similar workshop lit from left, sawdust + tools around workpiece
entries.hero_use_case: About-page hero for heritage joiners. Pairs with 12_06_42 as 'measure twice, cut once' narrative.

entries.subject: Golden-hour worker using yellow DeWalt circular saw on timber, sawdust flying off blade, scaffold-framed building silhouette behind, sunset sky, pine treeline
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for site / first-fix carpenters. DeWalt yellow accent works as CTA colour.

entries.subject: Site foreman in white hard hat + orange hi-vis vest, on phone, back to camera, watching over building site with tower crane and multiple workers
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for construction management / builder companies. Signals scale + oversight.

entries.subject: Site foreman in white hard hat + yellow-green hi-vis vest with rolled plans under arm, overlooking large scaffolded build site at sunset
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for builder company / development firm. Rolled plans signal 'we plan before we build'.

entries.subject: Large yellow excavator dominant right, crane + concrete-frame build behind, sunset backdrop, foreground earth-moving track
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for plant hire / groundworks contractors. Big yellow excavator = clear trade identifier.

entries.subject: Kitchen fitter installing unfinished oak in-frame kitchen with island + wall units, tools on island (drill + tape + level), window light, minimalist worksite
entries.hero_use_case: Service-page hero for kitchen fitters. Unfinished kitchen signals 'we're mid-install' authenticity.

entries.subject: Kitchen manufacturing workshop with 2 workers, in-frame oak island in progress, industrial CNC saws behind, laminate wall unit visible right, marble worktop stock
entries.hero_use_case: About-page hero for kitchen manufacturers. 'We make it ourselves' — pairs with 02_10_31 install shot.

entries.subject: White hat + orange hi-vis foreman back to camera, dramatic city skyline + tower-crane build + excavator + workers below, sunset over urban development
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for commercial construction / urban development firms. Reads as 'we deliver at scale'.

entries.subject: Yellow bulldozer at night with engine hood open, mechanic in dark hi-vis with BREAKDOWN SERVICE back-print working under floodlight, van right with tools, 24/7 wrench graphic top-left overlay

text_zone.primary: right-third (dark sky) — 24/7 badge already occupies top-left

entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for plant machinery breakdown / mobile mechanic services. FIRST night-time emergency image in library.

entries.subject: Worker in hard hat + yellow hi-vis kneeling on freshly-laid floor tiles with trowel, scissor lift + tractor + concrete building interior with pallets of sand + tiles, industrial partial-build interior with sunset streaming through glass roof
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for commercial / warehouse floor tilers. Scale of building signals 'we do big spaces'.

entries.subject: New-build house with 4 tradesmen visible — 2 plasterers rendering external block walls, 1 carpenter on roof pitch installing timber battens/tiles, 1 scaffold worker on far side. Block walls, oak roof frame visible, scaffolding, blue sky
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for main contractors / house builders coordinating multiple trades. Signals 'we manage the whole build'.

entries.subject: Golden-hour tradesperson in yellow hard hat + hi-vis kneeling with DeWalt drill on timber batten, blocks stacked around, half-built house behind with 2 more workers, dramatic sunrise
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for site carpenters / small building firms. Sunrise = 'we start early'.

entries.subject: Still-life foreground — yellow hard hat + rolled blueprints on plank, unrolled drawing beneath, tower crane + concrete-frame building right, dramatic sunset sky left
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for construction consultancy, QS firm, or architect. Blueprints = 'we plan first, build second'.

entries.subject: Same golden-hour worker in yellow hat + hi-vis using yellow DeWalt circular saw on timber, sawdust flying, timber-framed house being built behind with 2 more workers on scaffold, morning sun-flare
entries.hero_use_case: Service-page hero for site carpenters. Depicts frame-erection stage — pairs with roof / fascia / batten images.

entries.subject: 7 tradesmen lined up arms-crossed at sunset in front of partly-built house — mix of hard hats + branded tops + hi-vis + tool belts, half-built house with scaffold behind, dramatic sky
entries.hero_use_case: About-page / trust hero for builder companies. 'Meet the team' — signals scale + capability + hi-vis compliance.

entries.subject: Line-up of heavy plant machinery at sunset — 2 yellow excavators left + 1 orange excavator + 3 yellow dump trucks right, all parked in yard, dramatic sky
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for plant hire companies. Fleet lineup = 'we have the kit'. Orange excavator adds visual variety.

entries.subject: Dramatic sunset multi-trade site with 5+ workers — carpenter on frame left, bricklayers on brick wall centre, excavator mid-ground, roofer on scaffold right, foreman on scaffold. Full construction narrative in one frame
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for main contractors / builder companies. Multi-trade story = 'we run the whole build'.

entries.subject: Dramatic dump truck tipping load of grey aggregate/stone at sunset, yellow wheel loader left, yellow excavator right, dusty air, atmospheric sunset over quarry / earthworks site
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for aggregate / stone / hardcore delivery merchants. Tipping action + sunset = premium 'we deliver' brand.

entries.subject: Black articulated truck with yellow excavator loaded on low-loader trailer, driving through quarry site at sunset, dramatic sky, dusty air, hero-lit vehicle profile
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for plant machinery transport specialists. Signals 'we move the big kit'.

entries.subject: Beautiful landscaped garden with paved curving path, cream L-sofa under vine-covered pergola with fairy lights, lavender + white hydrangea + pink flower borders, immaculate lawn, evening warm-light glow

text_zone.primary: right-third (huge dark quiet zone from the composition)
text_zone.note: image has significant negative space right-half — perfect for large hero text

entries.hero_use_case: Premium landing hero for landscape gardeners. Massive right-side quiet zone is ideal for large hero text — best text-zone-to-image ratio in library.

entries.subject: Ornately carved oak entrance archway with hand-carved decorative brackets and floral motifs, mid-construction oak-frame building visible through arches, sunlit interior, scaffolding beyond
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for oak-frame builders / heritage timber craftsmen. Carved detail signals 'we do the ornate work others can't'.

entries.subject: Interior of UK Building Supplies warehouse with numbered aisle signage (Timber & Sheet, Building Materials, Landscaping), Toyota forklift centre, workers in blue hi-vis, blue/orange racking, DeWalt/Makita/Stanley/Hammerex brand wall right
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for building merchants / trade supply. Blue-and-yellow palette matches UK trade retail branding.
entries.note: Image has burned-in shop signage. Hero text should complement not compete — avoid overlapping the branded wall panels on right.

entries.subject: Dramatic scene at sunset — yellow 35-ton articulated dump truck left, large yellow tracked excavator right with bucket in air, small yellow bulldozer between, rocky earthworks site, dramatic clouds
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for large-scale plant hire / earthworks contractors. Dramatic sunset = premium brand feel.

entries.subject: Exterior of UK Building Supplies warehouse — large blue-clad steel building with signage 'UK BUILDING SUPPLIES' + DeWalt/Hammerex/Stanley/Makita brand banners, 4 open loading bays labelled Timber/Building/Landscaping/Plumbing, forklift + delivery truck + workers foreground
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for building merchants / trade yards. Signals 'come to us, we're open'.
entries.note: Contains 'UK BUILDING SUPPLIES' branded signage. Merchant using this image should either have compatible branding or be advised to use the interior variant (03_56_29) as it's less brand-specific.

entries.subject: Modern tool trade store exterior at sunset — black + yellow branding with 'PRO' signage on multiple panels + roadside pylon sign showing TOOLS/BUILDING/FIXINGS/WORKWEAR/ELECTRICAL/PLUMBING/SAFETY 'TRADE ONLY', wet reflective pavement, tradesmen loading vehicles
entries.vibe: modern trade retail / premium brand / dramatic
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for tool trade counters / professional power-tool retailers. Black + yellow = premium trade brand identity.
entries.note: Contains 'PRO' branded signage burned in. Best fit for merchants operating under that or a compatible black/yellow brand.

entries.subject: Plasterer applying wet render to cream external wall of house, side-on close view, hawk in one hand + trowel in other, black-framed window right, brick base visible bottom-right
entries.hero_use_case: Service-page hero for external render specialists. Alternate angle to the plasterer trio — outdoor domestic setting.

entries.subject: Composite hero image — sunset city skyline with tower cranes + construction, yellow hard hat + tablet + rolled blueprints + notebook + pen on wooden desk foreground, dark diagonal graphic panels overlay left

text_zone.note: left-side dark panels give ready-made text zone

entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for architects / consulting engineers / planning consultants. Composite style is marketing-oriented — pairs with corporate brand voice.
entries.note: This is a composited marketing image (multiple photos overlaid with graphic panels), not a natural scene. Best for merchants with polished corporate positioning.

entries.subject: 5 tradesmen in a circle chatting before work in builder's yard — mix of hard hats + hoodies + hi-vis + tool belts, timber stacks + concrete blocks + excavator background, cloudy grey daylight, one central worker wearing branded 'X' hoodie smiling
entries.hero_use_case: About-page / team hero for builder companies. Casual moment builds trust — 'we work together, not at each other'.

entries.subject: Paver kneeling laying charcoal grey square pavement slabs on gravel base, moody overcast evening sky, luxury modern house with warm-lit interior + veranda + wicker sofa behind, black slat fence left, stone-clad wall right, small lit trees, stacked slabs left foreground, tradesperson wears dark cap + black tee + tool belt
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for premium patio / paving installers targeting homeowners with modern-luxury positioning. Moody sky + warm house interior signals 'we finish jobs to lifestyle standard'.

entries.subject: Blocklayer laying grey concrete blocks on a house rear extension, existing beige brick house with black-framed windows behind, scaffolding visible, stacks of blocks + mortar tub foreground, overcast sky, tradesperson wears dark cap + black tee + tool belt
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for blocklayers / extension builders. Real-work authenticity — 'we build extensions to your existing house'.

entries.subject: Same blocklayer building garden wall / raised bed with grey concrete blocks, luxury landscaped garden behind with pergola + sofa + lit trees + hedging + wildflower borders, black fence, mortar tub foreground, moody overcast sky
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for landscape / garden-wall builders targeting premium residential. Signals 'we build the hardscape that anchors your garden'.

entries.subject: Same tradesperson persona on pitched slate roof, kneeling with hammer replacing slate tiles, exposed batten section showing repair area, ridge tiles visible top-left, chimney with 2 pots right, moody clouds behind, view of houses / rooftops below, hammer in foreground
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for slate roofers / roof repair specialists. Moody sky + real repair work = 'we come when your roof needs us most'.

entries.subject: Dark modern shower showroom interior with 8+ shower systems displayed against dark tiled walls — rain heads, chrome + matte black finishes, walk-in enclosure centre-stage with running water, sample bathroom staged behind, industrial track lighting, moody premium retail feel
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for premium shower / bathroom retailers. Dark moody palette signals high-end brand differentiation.

entries.subject: Product-hero close-up of installed chrome shower running water, chrome rain head + slide bar + hand-held mixer, glass enclosure, grey stone-effect large-format tile background, warm accent LED under-mount lighting left, single house plant, moody residential bathroom
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for shower / bathroom installers. Product-hero angle signals 'we fit premium kit'. Left tile has great dark rest zone for hero text overlay.

entries.subject: Product-hero flat-lay of plumbing components — copper pipes + brass gate valve with red wheel + PVC white pipes + braided flexi hose + brass fittings + adjustable wrench + red pipe wrench, dark textured slate / concrete background
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for plumbers / plumbing merchants. Copper + red-wrench palette pops on dark backgrounds — good for high-contrast text overlay.

entries.subject: Under-sink plumbing scene — chrome P-trap + waste pipes + copper stop-tap + red pipe wrench + adjustable wrench + fittings + white PVC pipe segments + blue tool bag on grey tile floor, working-domestic feel
entries.hero_use_case: Landing hero for domestic plumbers / emergency plumbing services. 'Real work' vibe suggests 'we've done this before'.

entries.subject: User-supplied sign-in page banner (visual details not machine-inspected)

theme_palette.note: not visually inspected — legibility handled by black scrim overlay in the sign-in page. Palette to be populated when the image is reviewed.

entries.hero_use_case: Left-half hero on /home/sign-in. Legibility gradient overlays the image so the amber brand chip (top-left) + white headline (bottom-left) read on any imagery.

entries.subject: User-supplied hero banner for /market (The Network). Visual details not machine-inspected — palette to be filled after review.

text_zone.primary: no overlay text — sits in right column, headline lives in left column beside it

theme_palette.note: not visually inspected — assumed warm amber/cream to match reference mockup.

entries.hero_use_case: Right column of the /market hero. Left column carries eyebrow + headline + copy + CTAs; the image is decorative rather than text-bearing. Full-bleed inside a rounded-3xl frame.

entries.subject: Interactive draggable slider revealing before/after photos of real work. Zero words needed. Perfect for painters, roofers, cleaners, restorers, tilers.
entries.hero_use_case: Auto-migrated from sections/hero/beforeAfterSlider.tsx. Landing hero for the hero.before_after_slider_1 section — trades listed in keywords_strict.

entries.subject: Side-by-side comparison hero for independent trades competing with corporate chains. Every row is a real customer pain point solved by using an independent.
entries.hero_use_case: Auto-migrated from sections/hero/compareHero.tsx. Landing hero for the hero.compare_hero_1 section — trades listed in keywords_strict.

entries.subject: Interactive spotlight follows the cursor and lights up the copy underneath a nearly-black overlay. Custom cursor ring. Falls back to fully-lit on touch devices.
entries.hero_use_case: Auto-migrated from sections/hero/cursorSpotlight.tsx. Landing hero for the hero.cursor_spotlight_1 section — trades listed in keywords_strict.

entries.subject: Location-first hero with a pure-SVG coverage map (rings + pins + pulsing beacon). Answers
entries.hero_use_case: Auto-migrated from sections/hero/mapHero.tsx. Landing hero for the hero.map_hero_1 section — trades listed in keywords_strict.

entries.subject: Editorial marquee. Three rows of massive typography scroll in alternating directions at independent speeds, with static copy anchored in the middle. Balenciaga aesthetic for trades.
entries.hero_use_case: Auto-migrated from sections/hero/marqueeScroll.tsx. Landing hero for the hero.marquee_scroll_1 section — trades listed in keywords_strict.

entries.subject: Photo-free, typography-first hero. Two CTAs, optional trust row. Fastest to load and reads perfectly on any screen — best for service trades where speed matters (emergency call-outs, plumbing, electrical).
entries.hero_use_case: Auto-migrated from sections/hero/minimalCentred.tsx. Landing hero for the hero.minimal_centred_1 section — trades listed in keywords_strict.

entries.subject: Bold industrial hero for plant hire + heavy-equipment merchants. Full-bleed background photo, dark surface, big display headline, dual CTA. Banner proportions on desktop. shadcn Button + Framer Motion.
entries.hero_use_case: Auto-migrated from sections/hero/plantHireBold.tsx. Landing hero for the hero.plant_hire_bold_1 section — trades listed in keywords_strict.

entries.subject: Full-bleed 50/50 editorial split on shadcn foundation. Photo left edge-to-edge on desktop; mobile: photo banner + tight content card + bottom CTA stack. Banner proportions (1600×800). Framer Motion staggered entrance.
entries.hero_use_case: Auto-migrated from sections/hero/splitPhotoLeft.tsx. Landing hero for the hero.split_photo_left_1 section — trades listed in keywords_strict.

entries.subject: Text-animation-first hero. Six selectable kinetic-typography styles: roll-up, fall-down, wipe-reveal, blur-focus, word-rotate, typewriter. Zero JS, pure CSS.
entries.hero_use_case: Auto-migrated from sections/hero/textKineticHero.tsx. Landing hero for the hero.text_kinetic_1 section — trades listed in keywords_strict.

entries.subject: Hero banner assigned by Philip 2026-07-11 as Manchester Tools Direct's storeHeroImageUrl. Visual subject not yet confirmed — awaiting Philip's 1-line description.

aspect_variants.3:4: not recommended — vertical subjects lose head/feet

entries.hero_use_case: Merchant-page hero for Manchester Tools Direct (plastering-tools-focused builder's merchant). Renders as a FULL-WIDTH, FULL-HEIGHT background across the entire hero card (minHeight 320px). All content — logo, name, verified pill, stats, Follow / Message CTAs — overlays the image with a 135° dark gradient (85% opacity bottom-left → 35% top-right) keeping text legible on any photo.

entries.subject: Hero banner assigned by Philip 2026-07-11 as Manchester Tools Direct's storeHeroImageUrl (replaces 04_06_22). Visual subject not yet confirmed — awaiting Philip's 1-line description.

entries.hero_use_case: Merchant-page hero for Manchester Tools Direct (plastering-tools-focused builder's merchant).
